auth.label: Custom API Key
auth.description: Ortto custom API key sent with the X-Api-Key header. Create a custom API data source in Ortto to get the key: https://help.ortto.com/user/latest/data-sources/configuring-a-new-data-source/other-integrations/custom-api.html.

extraFields.label: Region
extraFields.description: Optional Ortto instance region. Use default for api.ap3api.com, au for api.au.ap3api.com, or eu for api.eu.ap3api.com.

actions.name: get_people_by_ids
actions.description: Retrieve Ortto contacts by their contact IDs and return the requested fields.

fields.description: Ortto person field IDs to return for each contact.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Ortto people by contact IDs.

items.description: An Ortto contact object as returned by the API, including id, fields, and any associated account data.

anyOf.description: Ortto metadata for the request, including totals when returned.
The offset used by Ortto for this response.
The offset for the next page when returned by Ortto.
The cursor ID for fetching the next page when returned.
Whether Ortto reported another page of contacts.

raw.description: The raw Ortto API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ortto people retrieval result.

actions.name: list_people
actions.description: Retrieve people from Ortto's customer data platform with optional fields, filters, pagination, and sorting.

limit.description: The number of people to return. Ortto allows 1 to 500.

cursor_id.description: The cursor ID returned by the previous Ortto response.

fields.description: Ortto person field IDs to return for each contact.

q.description: A text search query for matching people.

type.description: The Ortto person collection to query.

sort_order.description: Sort direction for the selected sort_by_field_id.

sort_by_field_id.description: The Ortto person field ID to sort by.

filter.description: An Ortto filter object copied from the Ortto app or built according to the Ortto person/get filter documentation.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving people from Ortto.

items.description: An Ortto contact object as returned by the API, including id, fields, and any associated account data.

anyOf.description: Ortto metadata for the request, including totals when returned.
The offset used by Ortto for this response.
The offset for the next page when returned by Ortto.
The cursor ID for fetching the next page when returned.
Whether Ortto reported another page of contacts.

raw.description: The raw Ortto API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ortto people retrieval result.

actions.name: merge_people
actions.description: Create or update one or more Ortto people using Ortto's person/merge endpoint and merge strategy options.

additionalProperties.description: A value for an Ortto field ID. Ortto field values may be strings, numbers, booleans, nulls, arrays, or nested objects depending on the field type.

fields.description: Ortto field ID/value pairs, such as str::email or str:cm:custom-field.

location.description: Ortto location data for a person, such as source_ip or address/custom location fields.

tags.description: Tags to apply to this person.

unset_tags.description: Tags to remove from this person.

clear_fields.description: Person fields whose existing values should be cleared when supported by the selected merge strategy.

items.description: A person record to create or update in Ortto.

people.description: People to create or update. Ortto allows 1 to 100 people per request.

async.description: Whether Ortto should queue the merge asynchronously.

merge_by.description: Ortto person field IDs used to identify existing people.

merge_strategy.description: Ortto merge strategy: 1 append only, 2 overwrite existing, or 3 ignore existing.

anyOf.description: Next key only if the previous key is empty.

find_strategy.description: Ortto find strategy: 0 any, 1 next only if previous empty, or 2 all.

skip_non_existing.description: Whether to update only existing contacts and skip creating new contacts.

merge_by_alt_fields.description: Optional alternate field mapping for Ortto merge_by identifiers.

suppression_list_field_id.description: Ortto field ID used to compare new contacts against the email suppression list.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating or updating people in Ortto.

accepted.description: Whether Ortto accepted the merge request.

items.description: An Ortto contact object as returned by the API, including id, fields, and any associated account data.

contacts.description: Contacts returned by Ortto when the response includes contact records.

raw.description: The raw Ortto API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ortto merge people result.
